emails.theme: NEW: 4mm Ice Chain 14k Gold (Two Tone) + Signature Clasps
emails.shortDescription: New product launch. Two tone design creates the illusion of a diamond paved chain. Also feature signature clasps (Lion & Snake) as an add-on.
emails.notes: First email of the month. Brand new product launch. Product page has strong imagery. Mention adding a signature clasp to your chain.
emails.creativeDirection: New launch. Two tone design, illusion of diamond paved chain. Feature the chain solo, then show pairing with a signature clasp (Lion & Snake). Product page has strong imagery.

emails.product: Chain Breaker Collection (Apex Wolf, Mortis Skull, Regis Lion, Koda Bear, Rajah Tiger)
emails.shortDescription: Bold animal spirits shattering their chains. 5 animals in silver ($599) and gold ($3,109+). Break limitations with bold symbolism.
emails.notes: Collection spotlight. 10 products across silver and gold. Each pendant features gemstone or diamond eyes.
emails.creativeDirection: Bold animal spirits shattering their chains. Showcase all 5 animals. Silver and Gold. Each pendant features gemstone or diamond eyes and lab grown diamond borders (gold).

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY GIFTING: Most Loved Gold Chains, USA Made
emails.product: 1.8mm, 3mm, 3.5mm, 4mm Diamond Cut Franco Chains (all USA Made, 14k Gold)
emails.shortDescription: USA Made messaging front and center. Four best selling gold chains crafted in the USA. Father's Day gifting. Superior quality, no import tariffs, better price.
emails.notes: Gold chains focus. Tie to Father's Day. Include June 15 shipping deadline.
emails.creativeDirection: The gift he'll never take off. Father's Day gifting. Feature most loved gold chains. Include shipping deadline reminder (order by June 15).

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: For Every Kind of Dad
emails.shortDescription: Personality based gifting guide. The Adventure Dad (Voyager), The Bold Dad (Tiger/Lion/Chain Breaker), The Faith Dad (Champion/Redemption/Cross), The Legacy Dad (Memento Mori/Stoic).
emails.notes: Creative, fun angle. Different from standard product showcase. Should feel like a gift guide.
emails.creativeDirection: Personality based gifting. Adventure Dad = Voyager. Bold Dad = Tiger/Lion/Chain Breaker. Faith Dad = Champion/Cross. Legacy Dad = Memento Mori/Stoic. Each dad type gets 1 to 2 product picks.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY GIFTING: Most Loved Platinum
emails.shortDescription: Premium Father's Day positioning. Platinum as the ultimate investment. Feature most loved platinum pieces (Champion, Voyager, Alpha Wolf, Carpe Diem, Empire).
emails.notes: Platinum specific. High end gifting angle. For the man who deserves the very best.
emails.creativeDirection: Premium Father's Day. Platinum as the ultimate investment. Feature Champion, Voyager, Alpha Wolf, Carpe Diem, Empire in platinum.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: Last Call — Shipping Deadline
emails.shortDescription: June 15 is the LAST day to order chains, silver pendants, and platinum and still get delivery in time for Father's Day. Urgency driven.
emails.notes: Shipping deadline email. Clear, direct. Order today to get it delivered in time.
emails.creativeDirection: Shipping deadline urgency. June 15 = last day for chains, silver, platinum. Feature top picks across these categories.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: The Gift He'll Never Take Off
emails.shortDescription: Final Father's Day push. 3 days before Father's Day. Feature overall best sellers as last minute gift ideas. Strong urgency without being pushy.
emails.notes: Last Father's Day email before the day. Broad product selection. Still looking for the perfect gift?
emails.creativeDirection: Final push. 3 days before Father's Day. Best sellers across all categories. The gift he'll never take off. Strong urgency.

emails.shortDescription: Post Father's Day pivot to summer. The pieces everyone's been wearing this summer. Feature best sellers and trending pieces. Fresh, seasonal energy.

emails.creativeDirection: Summer pivot. Most loved styles. Best sellers and trending pieces. Fresh seasonal energy.
